sections.heading: Full text
sections.text:
Local Government Election
(Repeal) [No. 20 of 2016 511
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 20 of 2016
Date of Assent: 6th June, 2016
An Act to repeal the Local Government Elections Act, 1991.
[7th June, 2016
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia. Enactment
1. This Act may be cited as the Local Government Elections Short title
(Repeal) Act, 2016.
2. The Local Government Elections Act, 1991, is repealed. Repeal of
Cap. 282
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 4.00 each.
512
